problem id: 2774d7a4
category: bit_manipulation

rule: SHL(4) XOR SHR(1)

examples:
  10101000 -> 11010100
  01001000 -> 10100100
  11111100 -> 10111110
  11011100 -> 10101110
  01101011 -> 10000101
  00010001 -> 00011000
  10111001 -> 11001100
  11110101 -> 00101010
  11010001 -> 01111000

query: 10001011
predicted answer: 11110101
